summary: SLA113 Iteration 13 testing complete. All new features working: Build Pipeline (create/advance/delete), Compliance Engine (GLI/MGA/UKGC/CURACAO scans), Deploy Engine (CDN deployment with propagation), Pipeline Pulse (individual and Pulse All). Backend: 25/25 tests pass. Frontend: All 12 tabs across 4 partitions working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Build Pipeline requires ~14 advances to complete all 5 stages (Asset Compilation, Logic Binding, Shader Compilation, Bundle Packaging, Optimization Pass)
Compliance checks use random 85% pass rate as documented (MOCKED)
Deploy URLs are generated mock URLs (e.g., https://project-name.cdn.cloudflare.com) - MOCKED
Pipeline Pulse adds random $50-500 revenue per execution as documented
All data-testid attributes present on new panels and buttons
Individual Pulse button appears on hover (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 CSS)
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed projects, builds, compliance reports, deployments during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 now has 12 tabs across 4 partitions: FACTORY (Frontline, White Label Mint, Deploy Center), EMPIRE 1 (Mint Ledger, Revenue Pipelines), FOUNDRY (OS Builder, Vision Smith, Audio Forge), VAULT (Build Pipeline, Compliance, System Core, Night Queue). New features: Build Pipeline creates builds from projects with 5 stages, Compliance Engine runs certification scans for GLI/MGA/UKGC/CURACAO, Deploy Engine deploys completed builds to CDN (Cloudflare/AWS/GCP), Pipeline Pulse triggers revenue updates. Build advance needs ~14 calls to complete all stages.

backend_api.notes: Creates build from project_id with 5 stages
Advances build stages, needs ~14 calls to complete
Updates pipeline revenue (+$50-500) and execution count

frontend_ui.notes: BUILD PIPELINE, COMPLIANCE, SYSTEM CORE, NIGHT QUEUE all present
FRONTLINE, WHITE LABEL MINT, DEPLOY CENTER all present
Compile Engine form with target/optimization options, build queue with stages
Certification Scan form with jurisdiction selection (GLI/MGA/UKGC/CURACAO)
CDN Deploy form with provider/region selection, live deployments list
Pipeline cards with heartbeat, Pulse All button at top
Appears on hover for each pipeline card
Triggers all pipelines and updates total revenue

mocked_apis_list: Build compilation is simulated (stages advance with random progress 30-60%)
Compliance pass/fail is randomized (85% pass rate)
Deploy URLs are generated mock URLs (not real CDNs)
Audio Forge is visual-only (no real audio generation)
